name: Internal.io
description: Internal.io — No-code platform for building internal tools on top of databases, REST APIs, and third-party apps.

seo.title: Internal.io — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Internal.io: Internal.io — No-code platform for building internal tools on top of databases, REST APIs, and third-party apps.

when_to_use: Internal CRUD tool on top of PostgreSQL without writing React
Operations dashboard connecting multiple REST APIs visually
Customer data portal for support team with write access
Admin panel for a SaaS product without dev time
Internal tool for data ops connected to third-party SaaS apps

pros: Builds on databases, REST APIs, SaaS
review.verdict: Competent Retool alternative but hard to beat Retools ecosystem and momentum.
review.best_for: Teams building internal dashboards who want a simpler Retool alternative
review.not_for: Teams already standardized on Retool or needing its component depth
